title: Merlio
innerText:
🏛️
Track your SRS account

The Supplementary Retirement Scheme lets you contribute up to $15,300/year (SC/PR) and deduct it from your taxable income — a powerful tax-deferral vehicle alongside CPF.

Up to $15,300 tax relief/yr
DBS · OCBC · UOB
50% taxable on withdrawal
Invest in SGX, ETFs, bonds
Set up SRS →
